description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs PHPunit tests across multiple PHP versions with a MySQL 5.6 service. Include a before_script that executes bash bin/install_gitlab_tests.sh wordpress_tests root mysql mysql latest and set the variables MYSQL_DATABASE=wordpress_tests and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=mysql. Define five jobs named PHPunit:PHP5.3:MySQL, PHPunit:PHP5.4:MySQL, PHPunit:PHP5.5:MySQL, PHPunit:PHP5.6:MySQL and PHPunit:PHP7.0:MySQL, each in the default test stage, using the images tetraweb/php:5.3, tetraweb/php:5.4, tetraweb/php:5.5, tetraweb/php:5.6 and tetraweb/php:7.0 respectively, each with a mysql:5.6 service, and each running the command phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist.
